title: Project gate state as a gates array in issue show --json
description:
Replace the split `gates_required`/`gates_status` in `issue show --json` with a single `gates` array, enriched from each gate's latest run.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit issue show <id> --json` emits `gates: [{key, status, last_run_at, exit_code}]`, one entry per required gate, and no longer emits `gates_required` or `gates_status`.
- [ ] `last_run_at` and `exit_code` come from the gate's latest `GateRunResult` and are `null` when no run exists; `status` reflects `GateState` (or `pending`).
- [ ] The change covers `build_gate_context` (which serializes the response), the CLI schema, tests, and CLI-command docs; the domain `Issue` model and the server/web are untouched.
